message:
Running command: # Drain at 59068 lines - Yosys still computing register file (raddr2 connections)
# This register cross-connect is part of the decode/schedule analysis for the dual-port regfile
# Continue monitoring - check every 10 minutes with 6h budget
SYNTH_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 36); do
  sleep 600  # 10 min
  Y_ALIVE=$(pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  LR_ALIVE=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  DRAIN=$(wc -l < /tmp/yosys_drain.log 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  DRAIN_TAIL=$(tail -1 /tmp/yosys_drain.log 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  NL=$(ls "$SYNTH_DIR/"*.nl.v 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  MEM=$(ps -p ${Y_ALIVE:-1} -o pmem --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE} Y=${Y_ALIVE:-DONE} mem=${MEM}% | step=$STEP | drain=$DRAIN"
  echo "  $DRAIN_TAIL"
  [ -n "$NL" ] && echo "  NETLIST EXISTS: $NL"
  echo ""
  
  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane DONE ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -30
    break
  fi
done

function.name: execute_bash
